'''Ovvit''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Chev]] [[Pirate/Legends|pirate]] who worked as a [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] with the ''[[Boneyard Rendezvous]]''. He was ordered by his captain, [[Byalfin Dyur]], to [[Death/Legends|kill]] [[Ben Skywalker]] following [[Lumiya]]'s orders. Having hunted Ben and his companion, the child [[Kiara Olvidan|Kiara]], Ovvit was killed when Ben lured the [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighter]] he was flying to the side of a ruined temple and then [[Telekinesis/Legends|triggered]] a landslide which crushed the craft, killing the hapless pirate. Ben would later scavenge the TIE fighter for much needed supplies.

==Appearances==
*''[[Legacy of the Force: Exile]]'' {{1st}}
